detail:
Internal server error: PydanticUserError: `TypeAdapter[typing.Annotated[app.schemas.crm.DealCreate, FieldInfo(annotation=NoneType, required=True, alias='payload', alias_priority=2, json_schema_extra={})]]` is not fully defined; you should define `typing.Annotated[app.schemas.crm.DealCreate, FieldInfo(annotation=NoneType, required=True, alias='payload', alias_priority=2, json_schema_extra={})]` and all referenced types, then call `.rebuild()` on the instance.

For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/u/class-not-fully-defined
